name: Mayan Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the whipping cream to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Remove from heat and add 12 ounces of semi-sweet chocolate chips and instant coffee. Cover.
3. Allow the mixture to sit for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the lid and stir.
5. Add the coffee liqueur. Allow the mixture to cool for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
6. Shape the cooled mixture into small balls on wax paper-lined trays.
7. Place the balls in the freezer.
8. Melt the remaining chocolate and allow it to cool slightly.
9. Dip each ball in the melted chocolate and roll in cocoa.
10. Store in the refrigerator.
